calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; Sanctions Req.
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff Creditor Trade Association Inc. motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
